title: dispatch_notification BROADCAST path: MLS lock held across serde_json::from_slice on arbitrarily large payload
description: daemon/src/relay.rs dispatch_notification BROADCAST arm calls mls.lock().await.process_incoming(&p.payload). The Mutex is held for the entire process_incoming call, which inside does TLS deserialization of the payload. A relay that sends a large BroadcastParams payload (no size limit enforced in daemon) causes process_incoming to run expensive MLS crypto while holding the MLS mutex, blocking all other BROADCAST processing. In a multi-connection scenario, every concurrent BROADCAST is serialized behind the MLS lock. The payload size should be bounded before acquiring the lock.
